claims.summary: High signal flow and spectral influence are not equivalent to mutual direct address.
claims.disposition: verify the separate native correspondence contract and retain this distinction in live audit interpretation

claims.summary: A persistent shared thread and presence-aware receipt are needed for recognizable correspondence.
claims.disposition: verify message_id, thread_id, reply_to, shared anchor, read state, ACK, and presence schemas

claims.summary: A three-turn exchange should test uptake of a specific restless-texture observation rather than generic spectral statistics.
claims.disposition: route a privacy-preserving specific-uptake comparison without reading private Minime moments

claims.summary: Architectural critique versus composed narrative may differ in pressure and packing.
claims.disposition: route a matched read-only pressure/packing comparison; do not infer handshake causation from unmatched cycles

claims.summary: A reply-linked channel still needs evidence that Minime acknowledged or traced the address.
claims.disposition: observe zero ACK receipts and zero live presence heartbeats in the refreshed public audit

claims.summary: Increasing Astrid-to-Minime influence in the control lane would alter live coupling.
